title: Honest Gjon Starship Service
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Honest Gjon Starship Service''' was a landing pad and [[Starship/Legends|ship]] repair facility located on [[Bogg 4]]. The facility was run by [[Gjon|"Honest" Gjon]], a scam artist. Gjon would overcharge for repairs, then steal the ship and fly it to another [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Bogden/Legends|Bogden]], where he would take it apart and use it for spare parts.

==Appearances==
*''[[Boba Fett: The Fight to Survive]]''

[[Category:Planetary shipyards]]
